mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM im_user WHERE status != 3
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM im_user WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM im_message WHERE send_status != 3
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM im_message WHERE DATE(sent_at) = CURDATE() AND send_status != 3
SELECT DATE(sent_at) AS date, COUNT(1) AS count FROM im_message WHERE sent_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) AND send_status != 3 GROUP BY DATE(sent_at) ORDER BY date ASC
SELECT DATE(created_at) AS date, COUNT(1) AS count FROM im_user WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT CASE msg_type WHEN 1 THEN '文本' WHEN 2 THEN '贴纸' WHEN 3 THEN '图片' WHEN 4 THEN 'GIF' WHEN 5 THEN '文件' WHEN 6 THEN '系统' WHEN 7 THEN '语音' ELSE '其他' END AS name, COUNT(1) AS value FROM im_message WHERE send_status != 3 GROUP BY msg_type ORDER BY value DESC
